title: Stainless Steel Splatter Guard – 28cm Fine Mesh Frying Pan Protector With Comfortable Plastic Handle. Easy Clean, Dishwasher Safe, Durable Anti-Splash Shield For Cooking, Frying, Boiling, Steaming
features: KEEP YOUR KITCHEN CLEAN & SAFE - Tired of dodging hot oil splatters? Our 28cm stainless steel splatter guard is your ultimate kitchen hero, designed with fine mesh holes that let steam escape while trapping every rogue drop of grease. It’s perfect for protecting your skin, stove, & walls from unwanted mess, whether you’re frying eggs, sizzling bacon, or whipping up a gourmet steak. Keep your kitchen spotless, your hands safe, & your cooking stress-free with this must-have splatter protector!

COMFORTABLE GRIP, NO BURNS - Say goodbye to painful burns with our ergonomic plastic handle that stays cool even when your frying pan & splash guard is smoking hot. Designed for comfort and safety, this handle ensures you maintain full control and safety whilst taking off to do flipping, stirring, or straining your favourite dishes. Perfect for everyday cooking, it’s a thoughtful addition to your kitchen arsenal—ideal for anyone who loves to cook but hates the heat and splashes.

PROFESSIONAL-GRADE DURABILITY - Built to last, our splatter guard features high-quality stainless steel and a robust design that won’t warp, bend, or break under pressure. Whether you’re deep-frying in a wok, grilling on a gas stove, or sautéing veggies in a non-stick pan, this heavy-duty shield is ready to handle it all. It’s a kitchen investment that delivers long-term value and reliable performance, meal after meal.

EFFORTLESS CLEANING, DISHWASHER SAFE - Cleaning up after cooking shouldn’t feel like a second job. That’s why our splatter guard is not only easy to wipe down but also dishwasher safe for ultimate convenience. The fine mesh resists grease build-up and rinses clean in seconds, making it the perfect low-maintenance addition to your cookware collection. Keep it looking brand new with minimal effort and maximum ease.

VERSATILE AND CONVENIENT FOR EVERY KITCHEN - More than just a splatter shield, this multi-functional kitchen tool doubles as a strainer, sieve, or even a cooling rack. Use it to drain grease, steam vegetables or prevent sauces from spilling over. Its portable, lightweight design makes it ideal for everything from a busy home kitchen to a professional chef’s arsenal. With 28cm or 32cm of coverage, it’s compatible with most pots, pans, and skillets, making it your go-to cooking companion.
description: Transform your cooking experience with our Stainless Steel Splatter Guard—the ultimate solution to messy kitchens, hot splatters, & tedious cleanups. Designed for modern kitchens, these professional-grade splatter shields are crafted from durable stainless steel & features an innovative fine mesh design. The small perforations are just the right size to let steam escape while trapping grease, oil, & food particles, ensuring a clean & safe cooking environment. Comfort Meets Safety The ergonomic plastic handle is a game-changer. No more juggling hot tools or risking burns while trying to manage your frypan. Whether you’re flipping pancakes or sautéing shrimp, the cool-ouch handle provides a secure grip, even during high-heat cooking. It’s perfect for everyday chefs & culinary pros alike. Built for Versatility This splatter guard will be your new favourite kitchen multitool. Use it as a sieve to strain pasta, a cooling rack for baked goods, or a grease stopper for frying pans. Its lightweight yet sturdy construction makes it easy to handle, while the choice of 28cm or 32cm diameter fits most cookware, from deep pots to flat griddles. Compatible with all stove types, including gas, induction, & electric, it’s a must-have for any kitchen setup. Effortless Cleaning & Maintenance Nobody likes a messy kitchen, & that’s why this splatter guard is designed to be as easy to clean as it is to use. The stainless steel mesh resists grease buildup & can be quickly wiped down with a sponge or tossed in the dishwasher for a thorough clean. No scrubbing, no hassle—just more time to enjoy your culinary creations. Why Choose Us? Unlike other splatter guards, ours combines professional-grade durability with everyday convenience. The fine mesh design offers superior performance, trapping even the smallest splashes while allowing for optimal heat & steam circulation. The result? Perfectly cooked meals without the mess.
